# monik exchange

monik exchange is a Russian-language exchange monitoring site for comparing exchange rates, reserves, reviews, KYC/AML signals, and exchanger profiles.

Primary pages:
- https://monik.exchange/
- https://monik.exchange/exchangers
- https://monik.exchange/blog
- https://monik.exchange/wiki
- https://monik.exchange/contacts

Sitemap: https://monik.exchange/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://monik.exchange/robots.txt
